title: Templates
draftsIntro: Ready to review and submit to Meta. Opening a draft shows the variable legend (data meaning and format). Text / + Flow badges update on sync.
varCatalogIntro: Human guide only: what goes in each field and correct format. Does not change templates already approved on Meta. «Future» items are for upcoming approval requests.
configureAccess: Set ACCESS_TOKEN and WABA_ID to manage templates.
validationOk: ✓ Meets Meta variable rules. You can submit for review.
metaRules: Do not start or end with {{n}}.
varGuideDefining: Guide for variables you are defining
varCatalogPick: Suggested keys (reference only; not sent to Meta):
draftMetaSyncHint: Click «Sync with Meta» above to see approval status.
draftMetaReadyHint: When Text and + Flow are approved, sends will use the official Flow button template.
fixVarsBeforeMeta: Fix variable rules before submitting to Meta.
ncNoApprovedHint: You have no approved templates. Create one in Templates and wait for Meta approval.
ncFlowReadyTemplate: Will send the template with button to the tour.
ncFlowReadyInteractive: Will send the message with the published tour (interactive button).
ncPreviewHint: Approved templates only. Combine message and tour when both are available.
ncBillingInfo: Will be billed as {label}. Set parameters and send.
ncBillingDefault: Set parameters and send to open the conversation.
waPreviewNote: Preview · Flow opens when tapping the button
